idea-plugin.name: IDEA Theme F1rst
idea-plugin.description:
IDEA Theme F1rst 🎨

A collection of 5 vibrant and high-quality themes for IntelliJ IDEA and PyCharm.

  • Vaporwave Red Neon: Dark base with neon magenta and cyan.
  • Sky Garden: Studio Ghibli inspired soft look.
  • Cowboy Terminal Black: Retro green-on-black terminal.
  • Red Neon Future: High contrast futuristic corporate style.
  • IDEA Theme F1rst: Solid base with blue and grey tones.

Designed for comfort and productivity.
idea-plugin.change-notes: • 0.3.1: Initial release on Marketplace. Anonymized author metadata. Added high-quality descriptions.
